title: 2022 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This page is a listing/indexing page for Federal Reserve FOMC press releases from 2022. It contains links to statements, projections, and policy announcements but does not contain the actual content of those releases. Each FOMC statement referenced would need to be crawled individually as a separate source. This listing page itself should NOT be archived.
key_points: Page is a listing page (not an individual archiveable document)
Contains links to 2022 FOMC statements (8 meetings: January, March, May, June, July, September, November, December)
Also links to 2022 FOMC economic projections (March, June, September, December)
Includes one balance sheet-related item: 'Plans for Reducing the Size of the Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet' dated May 4, 2022
Includes trading rule item: 'FOMC formally adopts comprehensive new rules for investment and trading activity' dated February 18, 2022
Actual FOMC statement content not present in this listing page
why_it_matters: This source is a container page with no archival value. The individual 2022 FOMC statements contain the actual policy content relevant for macro catalysts research. The 2022 period covered the Fed's aggressive hiking cycle (from near-zero to 4.25-4.50%), making individual statements highly relevant.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type field - violates Core Rule 5 requiring rejection of listing pages
Source contains no actual FOMC statement text, only hyperlinks to statements
This is a container page with no substantive policy content for archival purposes
event_type 'unknown' is correct but source should be rejected entirely rather than archived
Individual FOMC statements (e.g., December 14, 2022 statement) should be crawled separately as standalone documents

notes: Non-archivable listing page. The source contains no FOMC statement text, only hyperlinks. For macro catalysts research on 2022 Fed policy, individual FOMC statements should be retrieved directly (e.g., crawl https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20221214a.htm for the December 2022 statement). The listed items include: January 26 statement, March 16 statement + projections, May 4 statement + balance sheet plans, June 15 statement + projections, July 27 statement, September 21 statement + projections, November 2 statement, December 14 statement + projections.
